step_rationale: hs-CRP anchor; hepatic acute-phase response to plaque inflammation and systemic endotoxemia.
mechanism: hs-CRP reflects systemic inflammatory burden from atherosclerotic plaque destabilization and leukocyte infiltration.

references.title: Composition of coronary thrombus in acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
